source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 9. TCF_ADD(HAD1417MCW) 221215 (Rev.4) - PMS Update/Attachment 07. Performance Test Report/07-02. Reliability Test Result Report (Doc.No. AIF 801-10-4).pdf

document.title: Reliability Test Result Report
document.documentType: Performance test report / reliability test result report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Reliability test result report for ADD detector models showing final PASS across operation, environmental durability, repetitive capture, power on/off, and aging tests.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides performance and reliability evidence for detector assembly technical documentation.
keyPoints: Main opinion states no sign of operational or other failure of panel due to substandard panel in the detector assembly.
Test model summary identifies ADD(HAD1417MCW), model name Detector, test step EVT, test time 2020.02.05~03.10, unit 1ea.
Detailed test sheets identify ADD(HAD1717MCW), model name Detector, developmental evaluation.
High temperature and humidity durability test cites applied standard IEC60068-2-78.
Heat resistance, high temperature/humidity durability, repetitive bright image capture, power on/off, and aging tests each report Pass/PASS.

entities.name: IEC60068-2-78
entities.evidence: Test Condition and Standard [Applied Standard: IEC60068-2-78]

concepts.name: Heat Resistance Test
concepts.evidence: Test Category Heat Resistance Test Cycle(30cycle) Result Pass

concepts.name: High Temperature, Humidity Durability Test
concepts.evidence: 시험항목 High Temperature, Humidity Durability Test Result Pass

concepts.evidence: Test Category Repetitive Bright Image Capture Test Result Pass

evidence.claim: The reliability test report has final result PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Reliability Test Result Report Final Result PASS Unfit Detail -

evidence.claim: The report opinion found no sign of operational or other failure of the panel in the detector assembly.
evidence.evidenceText: (Opinion) No sign of Operational or other failure of Panel due to substandard Panel in part of Detector assembly

evidence.claim: The summary test model is ADD(HAD1417MCW), model name Detector, EVT step, tested 2020.02.05~03.10 with 1 unit.
evidence.evidenceText: MODEL ADD(HAD1417MCW) TEST STEP ■EVT □MVT □Mass-Product(changed) □Other MODEL NAME Detector TEST TIME 2020.02.05~ 03.10 UNIT 1ea

evidence.claim: The final result page lists power on/off, high heat/humidity durability, repetitive bright image capture, heat resistance, and aging tests as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Power On/Off Power On/Off 500 Cycle; High Heat,Humity Durability 55℃ 95% / 512HR; Repetitive Bright Image Capture Test Repetitive Image Capture 500 Cycle; Heat Resistance Test -20℃ ⇔ 70℃ 30Cycle; No failure on Aging Test for 24 hrs

evidence.claim: The heat resistance test for ADD(HAD1717MCW) passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Heat Resistance MODEL ADD(HAD1717MCW) Test Step Developmental Evaluation Test Date 2020.02.05~02.11 MODEL NAME Detector

evidence.claim: The heat resistance test condition was -20℃ to 60℃ in 30 cycles with no failure on appearance and images.
evidence.evidenceText: No Failure on appearance and images under -20℃ ⇔ 60℃ in 30Cycle

evidence.claim: The high temperature and humidity durability test applied IEC60068-2-78.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Condition and Standard [Applied Standard: IEC60068-2-78]

evidence.claim: The high temperature and humidity durability test passed after 55℃ / 95% for 512 hours.
evidence.evidenceText: No failure on appearance and images under 55℃ / 95% 512hr

evidence.claim: The repetitive bright image capture test for ADD(HAD1717MCW) passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Repetitive Bright Image Capture Test Result Report MODEL ADD(HAD1717MCW) Test Step Developmental Evaluation Test Date 2020.03.07~03.08 MODEL NAME Detector Test Unit 1 EA Department Q.C Department Test Category Repetitive Bright Image Capture Test Result Pass

evidence.claim: The repetitive bright image capture test condition was 500 cycles.
The power on/off test for ADD(HAD1717MCW) passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Power ON/OFF Test Result Report MODEL ADD(HAD1717MCW) Test Step Developmental Evaluation Test Date 2020.03.08~03.09 Test Unit 1 EA Department Q.C Department Test Category Power On/Off Test Result Pass

evidence.claim: The power on/off test cycle was power on, dark image capture, power off for 500 cycles.
evidence.evidenceText: Power on -> Dark image capture -> Power off : 500회 PASS

evidence.claim: The aging test for ADD(HAD1717MCW) passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Aging Test MODEL ADD(HAD1717MCW) Test Step Developmental Evaluation Test Date 2020.03.09~03.10 MODEL NAME Detector Test Unit 1 EA Department Q.C Department Test Category AGING Test Result Pass

evidence.claim: The aging test condition was 24 hours with more than 1000 image acquisitions.
evidence.evidenceText: Aging시(24HR) : More than 1000 image acquisitions PASS

evidence.claim: Testing equipment included Chamber Neuron Fit MRU-800-ME, PC signal source, and naked eye inspection.
evidence.evidenceText: * Chamber [Neuron Fit MRU-800-ME] * PC [SIGNAL SOURCE] * Naked Eye

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit document date is present; dates in source appear to be test dates or approval/date stamps, so documentDate is left empty.
Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
Product model evidence is inconsistent: summary identifies ADD(HAD1417MCW), while detailed report sheets identify ADD(HAD1717MCW).
Source text appears OCR/preprocessed and includes minor text quality issues such as 'Befere', 'Humity', mixed Korean/English, and repeated page fragments.
